% Table 1: F1-Macro (primary metric)
\begin{table}[t]

\bottomrule

\end{table}

% Table 2: Cohen's Kappa (model vs gold)
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Cohen's $\kappa$ (model vs. gold standard) per level. Interpretation: $<$0.40 Fair, 0.40--0.60 Moderate, $>$0.60 Substantial.}
\label{tab:kappa}
\begin{tabular}{lccccc}
\toprule
Model & L1 & L2 & L3 & L4 & L5 \\
\midrule
Claude Haiku 4.5 & \textbf{0.827} & 0.802 & 0.791 & 0.791 & 0.789 \\
DeepSeek Chat & \textbf{0.768} & 0.759 & 0.761 & 0.731 & 0.749 \\
GPT-4o Mini & 0.722 & \textbf{0.749} & 0.733 & 0.693 & 0.677 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

% Table 3: Context Gain L1→L5
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Absolute and relative F1-Macro gain from L1 to L5.}
\label{tab:gain}
\begin{tabular}{lccccc}
\toprule
Model & L1 & L5 & $\Delta$F1 & $\Delta$\% & Best Level \\
\midrule
Claude Haiku 4.5 & 0.851 & 0.742 & -0.109 & -12.8\% & L1 \\
DeepSeek Chat & 0.767 & 0.752 & -0.015 & -2.0\% & L3 \\
GPT-4o Mini & 0.597 & 0.547 & -0.050 & -8.3\% & L1 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

% Table 4: Model Rank Summary
\begin{table}[t]
